name: io.github.nangman-infra/touch-browser
title: touch-browser
description: Evidence-first MCP server for public docs and research web workflows.

runtimeArguments.name: -y
runtimeArguments.description: Automatically confirm npm install prompts when launching the MCP package.

environmentVariables.name: TOUCH_BROWSER_SERVE_COMMAND
environmentVariables.description: Force a specific touch-browser runtime binary or wrapper command for serve/mcp startup.

environmentVariables.name: TOUCH_BROWSER_EVIDENCE_NLI_MODEL_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Override the default filesystem path for the evidence NLI model bundle.

environmentVariables.name: TOUCH_BROWSER_EVIDENCE_EMBEDDING_MODEL_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Override the default filesystem path for the evidence embedding model bundle.
